kiosk.touchToStartSub: Tap anywhere on the screen to continue
kiosk.announcement: Welcome. We kindly ask you to follow the steps when taking a ticket and wait until your number is called. Thank you.

selectService.title: Get a Queuing Ticket
selectService.subtitle: Please select your current customer profile to get the appropriate ticket

regular.title: Personal Banking
regular.desc: For individual customers performing standard daily banking transactions.

priority.title: Priority Banking
priority.desc: For existing VIP/Priority members. Requires card swipe or authentication to issue a ticket.

corporate.title: Corporate Banking
corporate.desc: For business representatives and organizations performing corporate transactions.

accountModal.title: Do you have an account at Architectural Banking yet?

accountModal.note: Providing your phone number helps us identify and serve you best during the transaction.

phoneInput.title: Please enter your phone number
phoneInput.subtitle: So we can identify and serve you best.

confirmModal.title: Confirm Service
confirmModal.subtitle: You are requesting a ticket for

printing.thanks: Thank you for using our service!

chooseService.title: Select Transaction Service

card.title: Open Account/Card
